title: rubus schnelleri
intro: Rubus schnelleri, also known as the Chinese raspberry or Schneller's bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus schnelleri include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. Rubus schnelleri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
